title: Crawling Mysteries
description: There is always another mystery to uncover.
body:
# Crawling Mysteries

## This is an "Early Access"

Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/C5aqq7PBMu) to be part of the development

---

Crawling Mysteries is under very slow development! You can read all the planned features on [Github (TODO.md)](https://github.com/Larguma/crawling-mysteries/blob/main/TODO.md). Follow us to ensure you don't miss any of the latest updates.

All the current implemented features are available in-game through the Cryptic Codex or on [Github (features.md)](https://github.com/Larguma/crawling-mysteries/blob/main/features.md).

New features requests/ideas or bug reports can be submitted with an [Issue](https://github.com/Larguma/crawling-mysteries/issues).

You can suggest lore or wiki entries to add to the Cryptic Codex by following the instructions on the [Codex Guide](https://github.com/Larguma/crawling-mysteries/blob/main/src/main/resources/assets/crawlingmysteries/codex/README.md).

---

There is always another mystery to uncover.
